summary: Phase 1 Finance Core & Admin Empowerment - Testing completed with bug fixes applied. Fixed 2 critical bugs: 1) Admin Settings GET was using cached SDK responses - fixed by using direct REST API, 2) User Detail Page had React hook error with use(params) - fixed by using useParams(). All 5 requested features verified working.

fixed.issue: SDK caching caused GET to return stale data after PUT
fixed.fix: Changed to direct REST API with cache: no-store

fixed.issue: React Error: use() hook cannot unwrap already-resolved params in client component
fixed.fix: Changed from use(params) to useParams() hook

critical_code_review_comments: Admin Settings API now uses direct REST API to avoid Supabase SDK caching issues
User Detail Page properly uses useParams() hook for client components
All commission APIs are in sync and cache-free with 'force-dynamic' export
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing users from database.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 Finance features are working. Admin Settings saves commission correctly. Commission API returns real-time values. User cards are clickable and navigate to detail pages. Personal commission can be set per partner. KYC documents display on user detail page (when available). Preview environment (emergentagent.com) was returning 502 errors during testing - localhost works correctly.

1_admin_settings_save.test: Changed commission from 15% to 20%, clicked Save, reloaded page

2_commission_api.result: Returns systemRate matching admin settings value

4_user_detail_page.result: Shows: name, email, role, phone, telegram, registration date, commission settings for partners, balance, role change dropdown

5_personal_commission.test: Set custom_commission_rate via API, verified with commission API
5_personal_commission.result: Personal commission reflected in effectiveRate when set, falls back to systemRate when null

bugs_fixed_during_testing.bug: Admin Settings GET returning cached values
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed GET to use direct REST API with cache: no-store and Cache-Control: no-cache headers

bugs_fixed_during_testing.bug: User Detail Page crashing with 'unsupported type passed to use()'
bugs_fixed_during_testing.root_cause: use(params) hook was used in client component where params are already resolved
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed to useParams() hook from next/navigation
